title: Create F&M 2 [Discontinued]
description: A modpack wich adds create and many other mods. You can build factory´s, trains, planes and much more.
body:
Create F&M2 is perfect for the Create mod experience. It adds the create mod and many other addons for the Create mod. The terrain will be generated diffrently wich adds new beutiful landscapes. If you want to farm and eat, then the Farmers Delight mod is perfect for you!
You can harvest new crops and make many new diffrent types of food. 

What is Create:
Create is a minecraft mod created by simibubi that allows you to make Contraptions and automate processes using Rotational Power. It adds many mechanical components and block variants to the game. This mod has good optimization and FPS, so it can be played on nearly any computer!

What can you do with Create:
You can automate many production´s for blocks and items. You can build big factory´s or small factory´s. The Create mod also adds Trains! You can choose from many diffrent track type´s.

How can I play with friends:
We added the mod e4mc. **You can open your world to lan and just copy the ip in the chat!**
**There´s no need to buy a server!** Perfect for you and your friends.

Is this client or server sided:
This modpack is client sided. Because of the mod e4mc there is no need to buy a server!

If you need any help you can join our discord: [https://discord.gg/x9jsed8qyR](https://discord.gg/x9jsed8qyR)![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d6a304b096edde0dd1349a83c773df585423c36.png)
